description:
Create a Wazuh agent group named 'linux-webservers' and upload a shared agent configuration (agent.conf) to it using the API at https://localhost:55000 (User: wazuh-wui, Pass: MyS3cr37P450r.*-). The configuration must include:
- <localfile> for Apache access log: format 'apache', location '/var/log/apache2/access.log'
- <localfile> for Apache error log: format 'apache', location '/var/log/apache2/error.log'
- <localfile> for Syslog auth log: format 'syslog', location '/var/log/auth.log'
- <syscheck> with frequency '600', monitoring '/var/www/html' (realtime='yes') and '/etc/apache2' (check_all='yes', report_changes='yes')
- <wodle name='command'> with tag 'listening-ports', command 'ss -tlnp', interval '5m', run_on_start 'yes'
- <rootcheck> with frequency '3600'
